title: The Thief
writer: Henri Bernstein, Max Marcin, Paul Sloane
actors: Pearl White, Charles Waldron, Wallace McCutcheon Jr.
plot: Mary Vantyne and her husband Andrew are the guests of Mary's old friend Isabelle Lenwright, who has married a wealthy man in contrast to Mary's impoverished mate. When Mary overhears some guests discussing her "dowdy" appearance, she
